violations.text: Persons unnecessary to the food establishment were observed in the food preparation, food storage, and/or ware washing areas. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
Various homemade sauces were was observed with dates exceeding 7 day datemarking. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
Inspector observed vacuum packaged meats in chest freezer. PIC informed to cease practice and submit HAACP /variance approval from RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (back kitchen and receiving area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (dishwasher ). New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
The (floors ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed area of exposed wood and cracks. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2027

Wood is used in the construction of (platform for grease trap) in the (basement) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
Inspector observed leak at pipes in basement area. Service technicians were present at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
